fomod.Name: Marth Requiem Overhaul
fomod.Author: Marth
fomod.Description:
A terminal load-order mod that rebalances Requiem toward Final Fantasy VII-IX style elemental mechanics, difficulty, and late-game power scaling.
Core features: - Elemental resistance cap removed; absorb tier heals player when resistance exceeds 100% - Armor rating uncapped with tighter scaling (fArmorScalingFactor halved) - 13-skill Mastery system: unlocks at base skill 100, grants +0-50% bonuses through usage-based XP (approximates vanilla 99-100 curve, doubled per level) - Boss Readiness MCM: multi-vector threat assessment for Alduin Phase 1 and Final (Fire Breath, Drain Vitality unresistable, 30% armor penetration), Harkon, Miraak. Thresholds auto-adjust when World Eater's Influence or Immersive Miraak Difficulty detected. - Live Feature Toggles MCM: resistance cap, armor cap, absorb, carry weight, regen, arrow recovery, cell reset — all toggleable in-game via GlobalVariable + Game.SetGameSettingFloat - Vendor gold doubled from load-order values, potion weight at 25% - 3-day cell reset (from Requiem's 30-day default) for FF-style reliable restocking - First-run intro explains all changes; full customization via MCM Features page - Optional FF-balanced Experience.ini: same total speed as Faster Leveling, weighted toward kills + quest completion over pure exploration - Requires: SKSE64, SkyUI 5.2+ (MCM), Custom Skills Framework (Mastery) - Compatible with: Experience.esp (XP rates), Cult of the World Eater - World Eater's Influence (raises Alduin thresholds), Cult of the True Dragonborn - Immersive Miraak Difficulty (raises Miraak thresholds)
